name: banana-sort
description: sort lines of many types simply: general, natural number, css, json.

banana-sort.css.padAttributes.description: Pad attribute selectors like [ attr = "value" ] instead of [attr="value"].

banana-sort.css.padCombinators.description: Pad explicit combinators (> + ~ & ||) with one space on both sides.

banana-sort.css.ruleSortOrder.description: CSS rule category order. Must include each of (:root, selector, ::pseudo, @at-rule) exactly once.

banana-sort.css.selectorListStyle.description: Top-level selector formatting for multi-selector rules.

banana-sort.css.selectorListStyleEmbedde.description: Formatting for embedded selector lists in pseudo functions like :not(...).

banana-sort.css.selectorSpecificity.description: When sorting selectors, ignore id/class specificity first and use # then . as tie-breakers.
